name: quill
when_to_use: 需要经典行内富文本编辑(粗体/列表/链接/图片/@提及)并要结构化产物(Delta 或语义 HTML)时用它,而非手写 contenteditable——选区规范化、Delta 文档模型、粘贴消毒都是坑;要块状文档结构则用 editorjs/blocknote。
why_valuable: 可靠的 WYSIWYG 富文本意味着驯服 contenteditable:选区/range 规范化、可操作的 Delta 文档模型、粘贴消毒、格式与嵌入;手写 contenteditable 是出名的跨浏览器 bug 温床。

data_in.note: 构造后经 quill.setContents(delta) 灌初始内容,或 quill.clipboard.dangerouslyPasteHTML(html);产物用 quill.getContents()→Delta 或 quill.getSemanticHTML()。theme 须加载对应 CSS(snow/bubble)。

schema.container: HTMLElement | string选择器 —— 必填挂载点(构造第一参)
schema.theme?: 'snow' | 'bubble' —— 默认无主题;用 'snow' 须加载 quill.snow.css

modules?.toolbar?: array | string选择器 —— 工具栏配置,默认无工具栏

schema.formats?: string[] —— 允许格式白名单,默认全部
schema.initialContents?: Delta | Op[] —— 经 quill.setContents() 灌入

spec.note: 编辑区随内容增高;给容器显式像素高或 min-height,禁 vh;工具栏另占约 42px。

uplink: 编辑内容由消费 AI 在需要时调 getContents()/getSemanticHTML() 取回;text-change 回调由其接原生,不预设统一契约。

carriers.widget: conditional:snow CSS 落 shadow;但 document.getSelection 跨 shadow 边界在部分浏览器失效,选区/光标有风险
carriers.codex: supported:ESM CDN,无 worker/wasm/uplink 硬依赖

isolation.evidence: +esm exports {default=Quill, Delta, Range, Parchment, Op, OpIterator, AttributeMap, Module};new Quill(container:HTMLElement|string, options?:QuillOptions) 已验证(core/quill.d.ts:121);QuillOptions.theme/placeholder/readOnly/modules/formats/bounds 均真;getContents():Delta、getSemanticHTML()、setContents() 已验证(140/156/193)。globalStyleInjection=no:主题 CSS 为外链 dist/quill.snow.css(200),+esm 对 document.head 零写入(grep 0)。globalEvents=yes:一处 document.addEventListener('selectionchange')(Selection 模块),destroy 时移除。globalDomMutation=yes:clipboard/bounds 辅助容器 append 到 document.body(×6)。shadowCompatible=conditional:大量 document.getSelection()(×17)——选区/光标在 shadow 边界外在部分浏览器不可靠(document.getSelection 不穿透 shadow),浏览器支持 shadow 选区时可用。

en.when_to_use: Use it for classic inline rich-text editing, including bold, lists, links, images, and @mentions, when you need structured output as Delta or semantic HTML instead of handwritten contenteditable. Selection normalization, the Delta document model, and paste sanitization are all traps. For block-structured documents, use editorjs/blocknote.
en.why_valuable: Reliable WYSIWYG rich text means taming contenteditable: normalizing selections/ranges, maintaining an operable Delta document model, sanitizing paste, and handling formatting and embeds. Handwritten contenteditable is a notorious source of cross-browser bugs.

data_in.note: After construction, load initial content with quill.setContents(delta) or quill.clipboard.dangerouslyPasteHTML(html). Read output with quill.getContents() -> Delta or quill.getSemanticHTML(). The corresponding theme CSS (snow/bubble) must be loaded.

schema.container: HTMLElement | string selector -- Required mount point (first constructor argument)
schema.theme?: 'snow' | 'bubble' -- No theme by default; 'snow' requires quill.snow.css

modules?.toolbar?: array | string selector -- Toolbar configuration; no toolbar by default

schema.formats?: string[] -- Allowlist of formats; all formats by default

spec.note: The editing area grows with content; give the container an explicit pixel height or min-height, not vh. The toolbar occupies about another 42px.
